hero.title: Agricultural Support Technology for Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Researching, applying, and transferring advanced technology to agriculture — for a green, sustainable, and modern farming future.

about_section.title: ASTRI Institute
about_section.body: The Agricultural Support Technology Research Institute (ASTRI) is a science and technology organization dedicated to researching, applying, and transferring technology for sustainable agricultural development in Vietnam.

research.title: Scientific Research
research.desc: Developing technology and engineering solutions for agricultural production

technology.title: Technology Application
technology.desc: Deploying IoT, blockchain and digital solutions in agriculture

trade.title: Trade Promotion
trade.desc: Connecting domestic and international partners, MOU signings, market development

training.title: Training
training.desc: Technical training programs for farmers and agribusinesses

contact_cta.title: Partner with ASTRI
contact_cta.body: We are ready to work alongside businesses, organizations, and local governments in developing sustainable agriculture.
